user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Cafe Near AGO (coffee break)
fields.description: Casual café a short walk from the Art Gallery of Ontario — perfect for coffee, light pastries, and a quick rest between the morning workshop and the gallery visit.

insertion_point.reasoning: Stakeholder Presentation ends at 11:00 AM and the AGO visit starts at 12:00 PM; inserting the coffee break at position 2 places it between those activities and is a short walk to the gallery.
